title: pogogyne serpylloides
intro: Pogogyne serpylloides, also known as California hyssop, is a perennial plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which are attributed to its essential oils, flavonoids, and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Pogogyne serpylloides include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as congestion and coughs, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of California hyssop can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
